title: Swinif Organization
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Swinif Organization''' was a group, probably a criminal syndicate, in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. They hired [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Vadon Lenitor]], and when she left, they were on good terms with her.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
